title: Smoky Potato Bowl
description: A hearty bowl filled with roasted potatoes, American cheese, and smoky bacon. Perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Slice the roasted potatoes into 1-inch cubes.
In a separate pan, cook the smoky bacon until crispy.
Transfer the cooked bacon to a plate.
In the same pan, combine the sliced potatoes and cook until golden brown.
Transfer the cooked potatoes to a bowl.
Add the cooked bacon on top of the potatoes.
Sprinkle shredded American cheese on top of the bacon.
Place the bowl under the broiler until the cheese is melted.
Garnish with chopped chives, if desired.
